name: Improper Neutralization of Script in an Error Message Web Page
description: The product receives input that is reflected in error message web pages without properly neutralizing special characters, allowing attackers to inject scripts that execute when users view the error page.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user input that flows through a CONTROL[error_handler] to an EGRESS[error_page_html] node without a TRANSFORM[html_encoding] node that neutralizes script-significant characters before they are embedded in the error response
